---
title: "Refined code and visualizations"
format: pdf
---

# Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

# data wrangling and visualization
library(tidyverse)

# allows file paths to work across computers
library(here)

# formatting axis labels
library(scales)

# working with dates
library(lubridate)
```

# Data

```{r}
#| label: data

# read in bird survey data
birds <- read.csv(here("data", "birds.csv"))

# read in NOAA weather data
weather <- read.csv(here("data", "NOAA_daily_summaries.csv"))
```

# Cleaning Data

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-birds

birds_clean <- birds |> 
  # convert observation date to date format
  mutate(
    observation_date = ymd(observation_date),
    
    # create monthly grouping variable
    month = floor_date(observation_date,
                       unit = "month")
  ) |> 
  
  # filter to only include waterfowl observations
  filter(
    e_bird_group == "Waterfowl",
    
    # remove repeat observations
    repeat_observation == "No",
    
    # keep observations within study period
    observation_date > ymd("2019-09-30"),
    observation_date < ymd("2025-10-01")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-weather

weather_clean <- weather |> 
  
  # convert date column to date format
  mutate(
    DATE = ymd(DATE),
    
    # create monthly grouping variable
    month = floor_date(DATE,
                       unit = "month")
  ) |> 
  
  # filter to study period
  filter(
    DATE > ymd("2019-09-30"),
    DATE < ymd("2025-10-01")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: joining-data-frames

# join bird and weather data by exact date
bird_weather <- full_join(
  x = birds_clean,
  y = weather_clean,
  
  # match bird observation dates to weather dates
  by = c("observation_date" = "DATE")
) |> 
  
  # keep only variables of interest
  select(
    observation_date,
    season,
    species,
    count,
    PRCP
  )
```

# Summaries

```{r}
#| label: monthly-precipitation

# calculate total monthly precipitation
monthly_precip <- weather_clean |> 
  
  # group observations by month
  group_by(month) |> 
  
  # sum precipitation within each month
  summarize(
    monthly_prcp = sum(PRCP, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # remove grouping after summarizing
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: monthly-waterfowl-abundance

# calculate monthly abundance by species
monthly_waterfowl <- birds_clean |> 
  
  # group by month and species
  group_by(month, species) |> 
  
  # sum bird counts within each month
  summarize(
    abundance = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # remove grouping after summarizing
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: total-monthly-waterfowl

# calculate total monthly waterfowl abundance
total_monthly_waterfowl <- birds_clean |> 
  
  # group by month
  group_by(month) |> 
  
  # sum all bird counts within each month
  summarize(
    total_abundance = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # remove grouping after summarizing
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

# Joining data

```{r}
#| label: joining-monthly-data

# join monthly bird abundance with monthly precipitation
bird_weather_monthly <- total_monthly_waterfowl |> 
  
  # join by month
  left_join(monthly_precip,
            by = "month") |> 
  
  # arrange chronologically
  arrange(month) |> 
  
  # create lagged precipitation variable
  mutate(
    
    # previous month's precipitation
    lagged_prcp = lag(monthly_prcp)
  )
```

# trying visualizations

## Figure 1: Monthly Precipitation Through Time

```{r}
#| label: figure-1-precipitation
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

ggplot(data = monthly_precip,
       mapping = aes(x = month,
                     y = monthly_prcp)) +
  
  # Line with blue color + slight area fill beneath for depth
  geom_area(fill = "#4682B4", alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_line(color = "#7EC8E3", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 year",
    date_labels = "%Y",
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Precipitation Through Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Monthly Precipitation (in)"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    # Dark background — matches waterfowl theme
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#1C2B2D", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#243336", color = NA),
    
    # Subtle grid
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#3A4F52", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    
    # Title
    plot.title = element_text(
      color  = "#F0EAD6",
      size   = 20,
      face   = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 12),
      hjust  = 0
    ),
    
    # Axis styling
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "#B8C9C2", size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "#D4C9A8", size = 11),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "#3A4F52"),
    
    plot.margin = margin(16, 20, 12, 16)
  )

# Save figure to figures folder
ggsave(
  filename = here("figures", "refined-precipitation.png"),
  width = 10,
  height = 5,
  bg = "#1C2B2D"
)

```


## Figure 2: Waterfowl Abundance Through Time

```{r}
#| label: figure-2-waterfowl
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 7

# Nature-like palette
waterfowl_colors <- c(
  "American Wigeon"             = "#C1440E",
  "Bufflehead"                  = "#E8A838",
  "Canada Goose"                = "#6B8E23",
  "Cinnamon Teal"               = "#A0522D",
  "Gadwall"                     = "#8FBC8F",
  "Greater White-fronted Goose" = "#D2B48C",
  "Green-winged Teal"           = "#2E8B57",
  "Hooded Merganser"            = "#20B2AA",
  "Mallard"                     = "#4682B4",
  "Northern Pintail"            = "#5F9EA0",
  "Northern Shoveler"           = "#3CB371",
  "Redhead"                     = "#8B1A1A",
  "Ring-necked Duck"            = "#6A5ACD",
  "Ross's Goose"                = "#F4E4B8",
  "Ruddy Duck"                  = "#CD853F",
  "Snow Goose"                  = "#B0C4DE"   
)

# Reorder species so similar colors aren't adjacent in the stack
monthly_waterfowl <- monthly_waterfowl |> 
  mutate(species = factor(species, levels = c(
    "Snow Goose", "Ross's Goose", "Ring-necked Duck", "Redhead",
    "Ruddy Duck", "American Wigeon", "Cinnamon Teal", "Northern Pintail",
    "Mallard", "Northern Shoveler", "Bufflehead", "Hooded Merganser",
    "Green-winged Teal", "Gadwall", "Greater White-fronted Goose", "Canada Goose"
  )))

ggplot(data = monthly_waterfowl,
       mapping = aes(x = month,
                     y = abundance,
                     fill = species)) +
  
  # Including border lines between layers to reduce muddiness
  geom_area(color = "#1C2B2D", linewidth = 0.15, alpha = 0.92) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = waterfowl_colors) +
  
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 year",
    date_labels = "%Y",
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Waterfowl Abundance Through Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Monthly Abundance",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    # Dark background
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#1C2B2D", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#243336", color = NA),
    
    # Subtle grid
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#3A4F52", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    
    # Title
    plot.title = element_text(
      color  = "#F0EAD6",
      size   = 20,
      face   = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 12),
      hjust  = 0
    ),
    
    # Axis styling
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "#B8C9C2", size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "#D4C9A8", size = 11),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "#3A4F52"),
    
    # Legend
    legend.position   = "right",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#1C2B2D", color = NA),
    legend.key        = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    legend.text       = element_text(color = "#F0EAD6", size = 8.5),
    legend.key.size   = unit(0.45, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0.1, "cm"),
    
    # Margins
    plot.margin = margin(16, 20, 12, 16)
  )

# Save figure to figures folder
ggsave(
  filename = here("figures", "refined-waterfowl-abundance.png"),
  width = 11,
  height = 7,
  bg = "#1C2B2D"
)
```

## Figure 3: Lagged Precipation vs Water

```{r}
#| label: figure-3-lagged-precip
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

ggplot(data = bird_weather_monthly,
       mapping = aes(x = lagged_prcp,
                     y = total_abundance,
                     color = month)) +
  
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85, size = 4) +
  
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    name = "Month",
    option = "turbo",
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun",
               "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec")
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Precipitation and Waterfowl Abundance",
    x = "Previous Month's Precipitation (mm)",
    y = "Total Monthly Waterfowl Abundance (individuals)",
    caption = "Each point represents one month's waterfowl abundance plotted against the previous month's precipitation"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    # Dark background
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#1C2B2D", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#243336", color = NA),
    
    # Subtle grid
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#3A4F52", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    
    # Title
    plot.title = element_text(
      color  = "#F0EAD6",
      size   = 20,
      face   = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 12),
      hjust  = 0
    ),
    
    # Caption
    plot.caption = element_text(
      color  = "#7A9A95",
      size   = 8.5,
      hjust  = 0,
      margin = margin(t = 8)
    ),
    
    # Axis styling
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "#B8C9C2", size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "#D4C9A8", size = 11),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "#3A4F52"),
    
    # Legend styling
    legend.background  = element_rect(fill = "#1C2B2D", color = NA),
    legend.key         = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    legend.text        = element_text(color = "#F0EAD6", size = 9),
    legend.title       = element_text(color = "#D4C9A8", size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.height  = unit(1.2, "cm"),
    
    plot.margin = margin(16, 20, 12, 16)
  )

# Save figure to figures folder
ggsave(
  filename = here("figures", "refined-lagged-precip-abundance.png"),
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  bg = "#1C2B2D"
)
```

## Potential figure 4 — average abundance across seasons with scaled precipitation line

```{r}
#|: label: seasonal-summary

seasonal_summary <- bird_weather_monthly |> 
  
  # mutating data to create seasons from months
  mutate(
    season = case_when(
      month(month) %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
      month(month) %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Spring",
      month(month) %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Summer",
      TRUE ~ "Fall"
    ),
    season = factor(season, levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Fall"))
  ) |> 
  
  # creating average values across seasons and years
  group_by(season) |> 
  summarize(
    avg_abundance = mean(total_abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_precip    = mean(monthly_prcp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  
  # editing column names
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(avg_abundance, avg_precip),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "average_value"
  ) |> 
  
  # mutating variable names
  mutate(
    variable = case_when(
      variable == "avg_abundance" ~ "Average Waterfowl Abundance",
      variable == "avg_precip"   ~ "Average Precipitation"
    )
  )
  
```

```{r}
#| label: figure-4-seasonal-abundance-precip
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 7

# Assign each panel its own accent color
panel_colors <- c(
  "Average Waterfowl Abundance" = "#7EC8E3",  # sky blue — water/birds
  "Average Precipitation"       = "#6B8E23"   # olive — rainfall/nature
)

ggplot(data = seasonal_summary,
       mapping = aes(x = season,
                     y = average_value,
                     group = variable,
                     color = variable)) +
  
  # shaded area beneath each line for depth
  geom_area(aes(fill = variable), alpha = 0.15) +
  
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = panel_colors, guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = panel_colors, guide = "none") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ variable,
             scales = "free_y",
             ncol = 1) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Patterns in Waterfowl Abundance and Precipitation",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Average Monthly Value"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    # Dark background
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#1C2B2D", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#243336", color = NA),
    
    # Subtle grid
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#3A4F52", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    
    # Title
    plot.title = element_text(
      color  = "#F0EAD6",
      size   = 18,
      face   = "bold",
      margin = margin(b = 12),
      hjust  = 0
    ),
    
    # Facet strip styling
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#2E4A4F", color = NA),
    strip.text       = element_text(color = "#F0EAD6", size = 11, face = "bold"),
    
    # Axis styling
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "#B8C9C2", size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "#D4C9A8", size = 11),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "#3A4F52"),
    
    # Space between panels
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "cm"),
    
    plot.margin = margin(16, 20, 12, 16)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = here("figures", "refined-seasonal-abundance-precip.png"),
  width = 9,
  height = 7,
  bg = "#1C2B2D"
)
```
